packages.name: genswarms-delegated-spend
packages.description: Wallet-native delegated spending: immutable SpendRouter contract base + gasless permit-lane keeper (swarm object) + Telegram Mini App intake
packages.note: module is the keeper's swarm-object door (async registration, framework-stamped source identity); the intake HTTP path stays a synchronous call into the same core. Contracts (Foundry) and the Mini App webapp travel in-repo; consumers deploy their own SpendRouter subclass — no shared deployed contracts.
